rules.h1: font-display text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl uppercase tracking-wider leading-none
rules.h2: font-display text-4xl md:text-5xl uppercase tracking-wide leading-tight
rules.nav_links: font-body text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-white hover:text-primary transition-colors

decorators.bracket: before:content-['['] after:content-[']'] before:text-primary after:text-primary before:mr-1 after:ml-1 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-widest
decorators.slash: before:content-['/'] after:content-['/'] before:text-primary after:text-primary before:mr-2 after:ml-2 font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-white
decorators.step_num: before:content-['['] after:content-[']'] before:text-white/30 after:text-white/30 font-display text-2xl text-primary

effects.shadows: NONE. Use flat design only. Remove all drop-shadows and box-shadows.
effects.borders: 1px solid #2E2E2E on surfaces to create depth instead of shadows.

header.layout: h-[72px] w-full flex items-center justify-between px-6 bg-background border-b border-border z-50 fixed top-0
header.elements: Logo, Nav Links (uppercase tracked), VIN/Search input, Phone contacts, Lang switch, Avatar, CTA
header.style: No shadow. Pure black background. Links are hover:text-primary.

footer.layout: bg-background pt-24 pb-8 px-6 border-t border-border
footer.elements: Multi-column grid. Uppercase tracked heading links, stacked smaller body links.
footer.style: Pure black. Font Bebas for column headers, IBM Plex for lists.

hero.layout: min-h-[85vh] relative flex flex-col justify-end pt-32 pb-12 px-6
hero.elements: Full-bleed dark photo bg. Huge Bebas heading. Inline slash-separated stats. Bottom row: 3 inputs (Brand/Model/Year) + Primary Button.
hero.style: Background has dark overlay (`bg-black/60`). The search row is anchored at the bottom, inputs have bg-[#1a1a1a] and 1px border. No shadows.

stats_strip.layout: flex items-center gap-6 text-sm uppercase font-bold tracking-widest
stats_strip.style: Text is white, separators are primary amber slashes.

section_heading.elements: Kicker (slash), H2 (Bebas), Description (bracket, right-aligned or adjacent)
section_heading.style: Kicker: text-xs slash decorator. H2: Bebas uppercase. Description: grey body text in brackets.

provider_card.style: bg-[#111111] border border-border rounded-t-xl rounded-b-none hover:border-primary transition-colors. Flat panel. Amber hover ring. No shadow.

filter_chip_group.style: Pill shaped (rounded-full). Default: bg-transparent border border-border text-white. Active: bg-primary border-primary text-black.

input.style: bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-border rounded-md text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary transition-all.

dropdown_select.style: bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-border rounded-md text-white focus:border-primary. Custom chevron down icon in primary amber.

button.primary: bg-primary text-black font-semibold rounded-md h-[44px] px-6 hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors uppercase tracking-wider
button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-white font-semibold rounded-md h-[44px] px-6 hover:border-primary transition-colors uppercase tracking-wider

modal_dialog.layout: fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-50
modal_dialog.panel: bg-[#0d0d0d] border border-border rounded-xl w-full max-w-md p-6 no-shadow
modal_dialog.style: Header in Bebas Neue. Close button in top right. Inputs are #1a1a1a.

tab_pill_group.layout: inline-flex p-1 bg-black rounded-full border border-border
tab_pill_group.tab: px-6 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold transition-all data-[state=active]:bg-primary data-[state=active]:text-black text-white

process_step.style: Step number uses bracket decorator `[1]`. Title in Bebas. Body in IBM Plex. Border-left indicator.

tier_card.layout: flex flex-col p-8 border border-border bg-[#141414] rounded-t-xl rounded-b-none relative
tier_card.style: If popular/highlighted: border-primary with `[ popular ]` bracket label on top. No shadows.

before_after_card.layout: grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 bg-[#111111] border border-border p-4 rounded-t-xl rounded-b-none
before_after_card.elements: Two images. Date/Price strip at the bottom. Image container has max 8px radius.

review_card.layout: flex flex-col gap-4 p-6 bg-[#111111] border border-border rounded-t-xl rounded-b-none
review_card.elements: Top: Avatar circle + Name. Body: Text. Side: Rating badge `4.9 / 31 reviews`.

faq_accordion.style: Question in Bebas with numbered prefix `1/`. Chevron toggle. Answer in IBM Plex.

cta_banner.layout: w-full min-h-[40vh] relative flex items-center justify-center text-center p-12
cta_banner.style: Full bleed image with bg-black/70 overlay. Huge Bebas text + Primary Button.

toast.layout: bg-[#141414] border border-border text-white rounded-md p-4 flex items-center gap-3
toast.style: No shadow. Accent left border using primary color or success/danger color.

structure: Hero (full bleed, search bar anchored at bottom)
Search Container (Top bar with Inputs + Filter chip group)
Main 2-col layout: Left (Specs, Services, About, Reviews), Right (Sticky Booking CTA Card)
Centered single column: Live Timeline (Vertical process steps)
Auth Form (Inputs + Button) in a flat panel (border, no shadow, #0d0d0d bg)

gaps_to_close: REMOVE all box-shadows globally (shadow-sm, shadow-md, shadow-lg, etc.). Use border border-[#2E2E2E] for depth.
REPLACE existing fonts with Bebas Neue (Display) and IBM Plex Sans (Body). Update tailwind.config.js.
ENFORCE background colors strictly: root `#000000`, surfaces `#0d0d0d`, `#141414`, `#1a1a1a`.
UPDATE border radius: remove all rounded-xl or rounded-2xl if they apply to bottoms. Use rounded-t-xl rounded-b-none for cards.
UPDATE Modals to use Radix UI patterns if applicable, but style with #0d0d0d bg, 1px border, 0px shadow.
UPDATE Accent color to exact hex #FFB020.
IMPLEMENT bracket decorators `[ label ]` and slash decorators `/ label /` on section headings and metadata.

hero_backgrounds.description: Neon lit dark garage with mechanic, suitable for main hero background
Silhouette of a mechanic in dark garage

testimonials.description: Mechanic working in garage for testimonial or process section backgrounds

instructions_to_main_agent: All files are in .js (React JS, not TSX). Do not use TypeScript syntax.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, modaltoggles, links).
Replace old UI components. Implement strictly according to the 'gaps_to_close'.
Do not use native select; implement custom select/dropdown with #1a1a1a bg and amber chevron.
Tabs should be segmented pills on a black background. Active tab must be #FFB020.

To use Bebas Neue and IBM Plex Sans, add them to index.css via Google Fonts import: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600&display=swap');
Tailwind config update: add { fontFamily: { display: ['Bebas Neue', 'sans-serif'], body: ['IBM Plex Sans', 'sans-serif'] }, colors: { primary: '#FFB020', background: '#000000', border: '#2E2E2E' } }
